summary: Iteration 17: Frontend UI testing for multiple mobile service landing refinements. All 12 test features PASSED. Standard navbar with FixitBay LLC and hamburger menu visible, breadcrumbs working, Google Rating badge clickable, Common Issues chips wrapping (flex-wrap not scroll), brand logos in 4-column grid, 'and more' linking to /brands, Step 3 circle is gold (#FBBF24), Google and Thumbtack review links clickable, washer-repair uses same MobileServiceLanding template, desktop Brands page and desktop RefrigeratorRepair show brand logos.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MobileServiceLanding.js is the reusable mobile template for all service pages (breakpoint <768px). Desktop uses ApplianceRepairPageNew template. Gold color for Step 3 is #FBBF24 = rgb(251, 191, 36). Brand logos stored at /images/brands/*.svg and *.png. Standard navbar shows 'FixitBay LLC' with hamburger menu on mobile.

test_1_navbar.details: Standard navbar with 'FixitBay LLC' visible at top, hamburger menu present

test_3_google_rating_clickable.details: '4.9 Google Rating' badge is clickable link to https://share.google/tzOat1MbpLs1O5mzu

test_4_issues_chips_wrap.details: Common Issues chips use flex-wrap (wrap), NO horizontal scroll - display=flex, flexWrap=wrap, overflowX=visible

test_5_brand_logos_grid.details: Found 8 brand logo images (Sub-Zero, Viking, Thermador, LG, Whirlpool, Samsung, Bosch, GE) in 4-column grid

test_8_google_review_link.details: 'Google:' text is clickable link to https://share.google/tzOat1MbpLs1O5mzu

test_10_washer_repair_same_design.details: Mobile /washer-repair shows same design: navbar, breadcrumbs (Home / Services / Washer Repair), hero, issues chips wrapping, 8 brand logos, sticky bar

test_11_brands_page_logos.details: Desktop /brands page shows 25 brand cards with logo images

test_12_refrigerator_repair_brands.details: Desktop /refrigerator-repair shows 18 brand LOGOS in 'Brands We Service' section (Whirlpool, GE, Samsung, LG, KitchenAid, Bosch, Sub-Zero, Wolf, Miele, Electrolux, Fisher&Paykel, Amana, etc.)
